# Changelog

## 2026-05-12
- Registered ChunZiShu (蠢子數) in the system registry (cat_chinese) so it appears in the sidebar.
- Added 蠢子數 to the app.py homepage `_categories` showcase (Chinese section); total systems now 70.
- Updated README.md: badge 69→70, system count text (七十體系), system table row #21 for ChunZiShu, renumbered subsequent rows (#22–#70).

## 2026-05-11
- Added the Di Qi Yi Jue (滌器遺訣 / 邵子氣數) module as a first-class KinAstro package.
- Registered the new system in the Streamlit app, sidebar registry, i18n catalog, and icon metadata.
- Added focused tests covering public chart computation, package exports, and legacy validation examples.
